page.title: Marbella Pride Yacht Party: BYO Cava, DJ Add-on, Rainbow Bunting From €749

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella Pride yacht party from €749/2h. BYO cava, DJ add-on, rainbow bunting included. Departs Puerto Banús. Celebrate on the water.
data.summary: Celebrate Marbella Pride with a private yacht party from €749/2h, including BYO cava, DJ add-on, and rainbow bunting. Departs Puerto Banús with full crew and drinks included.
key_facts: Prices from €749 for 2 hours (Tier A boats: Astondoa 40, Azimut 39).
BYO cava welcome; rainbow bunting provided free of charge.
DJ add-on available on request (pricing via WhatsApp).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance.
Departs Puerto Banús; cruise past Marbella's Golden Mile.
Maximum capacity up to 12 pax on larger yachts (e.g., Mangusta 80).
Spanish IVA (21%) included in all prices.

faq.q: What boats are available for a Marbella Pride yacht party?
faq.a: We offer Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h, and Tier B boats (Mangusta 80, including grey and white variants) from €4,719/4h. Other yachts are available on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I bring my own cava on board?
faq.a: Yes, BYO cava is welcome. We also provide water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava as part of the standard inclusions, plus light snacks.

faq.q: Is there a DJ option for the party?
faq.a: Yes, a DJ add-on is available. Please contact us via WhatsApp for pricing and availability. We can arrange a DJ to play your favourite tracks.

faq.q: What is included in the price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

faq.q: Where does the yacht depart from?
faq.a: All yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You can cruise along the coast past the Golden Mile, Cabopino, or Estepona, depending on your chosen route.

faq.q: What is the maximum group size?
faq.a: Capacity varies by boat. The Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 take up to 9-11 pax. Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 (24m) can host up to 12 pax. Check individual boat specs.

faq.q: Can I customise the decorations for Pride?
faq.a: Absolutely. We provide rainbow bunting free of charge. You can also bring your own decorations. Just let us know in advance so we can assist.

faq.q: How do I book a Marbella Pride yacht party?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp on the number shown on our site. We'll confirm availability, pricing, and any add-ons like a DJ. A deposit secures your booking.

data.body_html:
Celebrate Marbella Pride in style with a private yacht party from €749 for two hours. Departing from Puerto Banús, your group can BYO cava, enjoy rainbow bunting, and add a DJ for the ultimate floating fiesta. All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance — no hidden costs.

Why choose a yacht for Marbella Pride?

Marbella Pride brings the Costa del Sol to life with parades, parties, and a welcoming atmosphere. A yacht adds exclusivity: you control the guest list, the music, and the route. Cruise past the Golden Mile, drop anchor at Cala del Faro, or watch the sunset over La Concha. With capacities from 5 to 12 guests, there's a boat for every group size.

Our Pride-ready boats

We have two pricing tiers for Pride parties, both departing Puerto Banús:

  • Tier A (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39): from €749/2h, up to €2,299/8h. Includes skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT.
  • Tier B (Mangusta 80, white/grey variants): from €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a free jet ski. Capacity up to 12 pax.
  • Other boats (e.g., Ferretti 94, Pershing 46) available on request via WhatsApp.

What's included in every charter

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

Plus, we provide rainbow bunting free of charge. BYO cava is welcome. DJ add-on available — contact us for pricing.

Sample itinerary for a Pride party

A typical 4-hour charter from Puerto Banús might include:

  • Departure from Puerto Banús marina
  • 30-minute cruise east towards Marbella's Golden Mile
  • Anchor stop at Cala Cortés for swimming and photos
  • Return via Cabopino, with music and drinks throughout
  • Drop-off back at Puerto Banús

Longer charters can reach Estepona or Sotogrande. The skipper will tailor the route to your preferences.

Add a DJ for the ultimate party

Make your Marbella Pride yacht party unforgettable with a professional DJ. We can arrange a DJ to play house, pop, or your own playlist. Pricing depends on duration and equipment. Message us on WhatsApp to discuss options.

How to book

Booking is simple. Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and any add-ons (DJ, extra cava). We'll confirm availability and send a quote. A deposit secures the booking; balance is due before departure. Browse all our boats for more options.

Frequently asked questions

What boats are available for a Marbella Pride yacht party?

We offer Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h, and Tier B boats (Mangusta 80, including grey and white variants) from €4,719/4h. Other yachts are available on request via WhatsApp.

Can I bring my own cava on board?

Yes, BYO cava is welcome. We also provide water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava as part of the standard inclusions, plus light snacks.

Is there a DJ option for the party?

Yes, a DJ add-on is available. Please contact us via WhatsApp for pricing and availability. We can arrange a DJ to play your favourite tracks.

What is included in the price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

Where does the yacht depart from?

All yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You can cruise along the coast past the Golden Mile, Cabopino, or Estepona, depending on your chosen route.

What is the maximum group size?

Capacity varies by boat. The Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 take up to 9-11 pax. Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 (24m) can host up to 12 pax. Check individual boat specs.

Can I customise the decorations for Pride?

Absolutely. We provide rainbow bunting free of charge. You can also bring your own decorations. Just let us know in advance so we can assist.

How do I book a Marbella Pride yacht party?

Contact us via WhatsApp on the number shown on our site. We'll confirm availability, pricing, and any add-ons like a DJ. A deposit secures your booking.
